original_statement: which team was the latest runner-up?
mutated_statement: which group was the latest something?
mutation_analysis: Semantic generalization + Lexical masking: Head noun "team" generalized to broader "group" (team→group) | Specific role "runner-up" replaced by vague placeholder "something" (runner-up→something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述：“The table lists seasons chronologically, with the latest season being 2013. The team (group) for 2013 is the Seattle Seahawks.”可见agent在judge_thought中没有提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未使用ambiguous、unclear、需要澄清等词汇。具体表现为：在iteration 0中直接执行了一系列数据操作（sort_column、add_column、select_column、group_column、simple_query），并在thought中给出确定性结论“The latest season...Seattle Seahawks”，返回了具体答案。由于agent未识别或提示变异问题中“something”一词的模糊替代，也未向用户询问或表示不确定，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
